name: Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling
student_summary: Teach directly to students worldwide — your own classroom, your rules.
overview: Teach directly to students worldwide — your own classroom, your rules. Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling sits in the Teaching family of Education & Training. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: Explaining things so others finally get it satisfies you
You would rather build your own thing than follow a script
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply online pedagogy to real problems
Collaborate with your team using student acquisition
Keep improving at personalized teaching — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Teaching foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of student acquisition
projects: Beginner: explore online pedagogy with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Zoom
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.

faqs: What does Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹15 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Your strongest subjects. Typical degrees: Any degree + subject mastery. Alternatives exist: any degree + b.ed.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Online Tutoring & Micro-schooling is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
